title: Partition expansion prioritization
difficulty_justification: Requires integrating 30-day utilization data across all partitions, applying capacity thresholds from the planning guide, and making a justified expansion recommendation.
query_text: Based on current utilization trends across all compute partitions, which partition should be prioritized for expansion first, and what is the business case?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Priority 1: gpu_v100 partition — 91% utilization over 30 days, exceeding the 80% trigger threshold. Expansion is already approved (8× H100 nodes, 2026-Q3 delivery). This partition is the primary bottleneck. Priority 2: cpu_standard at 72% — below threshold but trending up; monitor monthly. highmem at 63% is healthy. Business case for GPU expansion: 91% utilization means significant queue wait times, likely causing researcher productivity loss. The H100 upgrade also brings ~3× FLOPS improvement per node, effectively equivalent to 24 additional V100-equivalent nodes.

checkpoints.description: Agent compares all partition utilization values.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer mentions all three partition utilization values

checkpoints.description: Agent identifies gpu_v100 as the expansion priority.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer identifies gpu_v100 as highest priority

checkpoints.description: Agent references 80% threshold from capacity planning guide.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer or trace references 80% threshold from docs
